auto-refresh.tooltip: When off (recommended), the applet only fetches when you click the icon or pick Refresh now. Turn on to also poll on a timer — but be aware this can hit Claude's rate limits if set too aggressive.

refresh-seconds.tooltip: Seconds between automatic polls. Only used when Auto-refresh is on.

click-debounce-seconds.description: Skip refetch if data is newer than (s)
click-debounce-seconds.tooltip: When you click the icon, skip the network call if the cached data is fresher than this. 0 = always refetch on click.

show-panel-label.tooltip: Turn off to show only the sparkle icon in the panel; click it to see percentages in the popup.

warn-threshold.tooltip: When the highest utilization crosses this, the panel icon switches to a warning style.

terminal-command.tooltip: Command run by 'Open Claude in terminal' menu item.
